occurrence_sentence: Quantum Delta NL, in collaboration with NWO, announces that 19 Honorees have been awarded €10.4 Million in grants.
Quantum Delta NL, in collaboration with NWO, announces that 19 Honorees have been awarded €10.4 Million in grants.

PRESS RELEASE — Quantum Delta NL, in collaboration with NWO, announces that 19 Honorees have been awarded €10.4 Million in grants as part of the second call of the National programme's Actionline 1 'Research & Innovation'.

Quantum Delta NL, in collaboration with NWO, announces that 19 Honorees have been awarded €10.4 Million in grants as part of the second call of the National programme's Actionline 1 'Research & Innovation'.

interaction_phrase: to realize the much-needed scientific and technological breakthroughs
occurrence_sentence: The goal of Quantum Delta NL and NWO is to realize the much-needed scientific and technological breakthroughs in the field of quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: The goal of Quantum Delta NL and NWO
occurrence_sentence: The goal of Quantum Delta NL and NWO is to realize the much-needed scientific and technological breakthroughs in the field of quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: strengthen the basis for the Netherlands' leading position
occurrence_sentence: This measure was introduced to strengthen the basis for the Netherlands' leading position in quantum research.

interaction_phrase: has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider
occurrence_sentence: He has served as a writer, editor and analyst at The Quantum Insider since its inception.

interaction_phrase: a list of awarded proposals can be found
occurrence_sentence: A list of awarded proposals can be found [here](https://quantumdelta.nl/news/10-million-to-19-dutch-daring-quantum-research-projects).
